title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
seoDescription: Free Lorem Ipsum generator for designers and developers. Generate placeholder text in paragraphs with customizable length. Perfect for mockups, wireframes, and templates.
howToUseTitle: How to Use the Lorem Ipsum Generator
step1Desc: Choose the number of paragraphs and sentences per paragraph.
step2Desc: Click Generate to create placeholder text.
step3Desc: Use the Copy button to copy all text to clipboard for your projects.
faq1A: Lorem Ipsum is dummy text used in the printing and typesetting industry since the 1500s.
faq2A: It helps focus on design without being distracted by readable content.
faq3A: Yes, Lorem Ipsum text is in the public domain.
